summary: Frontend-only re-test of the iteration-5 bug fixes (registration UI, role-section pending + view-details modal w/ Approve/Reject, no Registration Approvals sidebar item, PAN view modal + receipt, certificate print). All 8 UI flows executed end-to-end via Playwright on the public preview URL. Results: 8/8 PASS.

issues: Static placeholder 'REG-2026-08841' is hardcoded in markup; it is correctly overwritten by handleRegisterSubmit but a brief flash of the placeholder is visible if the API is slow. Consider blanking it on showAuthView('pending').

critical_code_review_comments: regStep(1) correctly walks the current .reg-step's input/select/textarea and calls checkValidity()/reportValidity() before advancing — confirmed it blocks empty Continue at step 1.
handleRegisterSubmit writes refEl.textContent = r.reference_id which produced SD1007/SD1008 in tests (role-prefixed code), matching the requirement.
openUserDetail loads /api/users/{id} and renders Approve/Reject for Pending or Block/Delete for Active — verified for both pending SD and active RT10234.
renderUserTable + loadUserTable correctly include Pending users in the role section (admin sees all statuses) — table HTML contained SD1007 + 'Pending' badge before any refresh.

Sidebar nav configuration in getNavConfig() omits the registrations item entirely — verified Sidebar text has no 'Registration Approvals'. Note: a stale view/route '#view-registrations' and viewMeta entry still exist in index.html (lines 1727, 2123) but are unreachable via nav. Recommend deleting the dead view/markup to reduce confusion (minor cleanup).
printCertificate() opens a new window and writes a self-contained HTML certificate; gracefully toasts on popup-block — confirmed no JS error and window.open was invoked.

openPanDetail populates #panDetailBody with applicant/type/status/AO fields + remark + receipt name; openReceipt opens p.receipt_path in a new tab when set — verified for retailer RT10234's approved app (APP-22056, receipt rcpt.png).
seed_data_creation: Two Pending Super Distributor self-registrations were created via the UI for this test: SD1007 (TEST 'SD Approve User', email sd_a_<ts>@example.com) — then Approved to Active; SD1008 (TEST 'SD Reject User', email sd_r_<ts>@example.com) — then Rejected. Seeded demo users (SD1001..SD1005, DT2031..DT2036, RT10234..) were not modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Registration generates role-prefixed user codes (SD####/DT####/RT#####), not REG-2026-#### — the static REG-2026-08841 in the pending markup is just a placeholder. To get dev_otp call the send-otp endpoint ONCE (calling it twice rotates the OTP and the previous one becomes 'Invalid or expired OTP'). Use #authView-login button[type=submit] (not button[type=submit]) — the page contains the hidden /developer console which also has a submit button. The admin sidebar has NO Registration Approvals item but a stale #view-registrations exists in the DOM (unreachable via nav). Test seed-data SD1007/SD1008 (status Active and Rejected respectively) is left in the DB.
rca of the issue: N/A — this was a verification run, not a bug RCA.
